headline: EPAM And TGS Seismic AI Platform Launch Puts Valuation In Focus
summary: EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) and TGS have launched an AI-enabled, cloud-native seismic imaging platform on AWS for energy companies. The collaboration focuses on modernizing subsurface operations with scalable infrastructure and automated workflows. The new platform is designed to support more efficient seismic data processing and cost management in exploration projects. EPAM Systems comes into this announcement with its share price at about $95.65, after the stock declined 7.3% over the past...
